com.semanticwww.yesir.utils
Class TaskEngine.ScheduledTask

java.lang.Object
  java.util.TimerTask
      com.semanticwww.yesir.utils.TaskEngine.ScheduledTask
All Implemented Interfaces:
java.lang.Runnable
Enclosing class:
TaskEngine
private static class TaskEngine.ScheduledTask
extends java.util.TimerTask

A subclass of TimerClass that passes along a Runnable to the task engine when the scheduled task is run.
